titleStmt.title: SII 19.182: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 182. (A.R. No. 422 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE EAST WALL OF THE PRĀKĀRA, VYĀGHRAPĀDĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of ten kāśu which had doubled itself (by accumulation of interest, made by one Nambirāṉ-aḍigaḷ Āchchapiḍāri of Varagūr. This was to be used by the temple servants for the maintenance of two perpetual lamps in the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār Tiruppulippagavar-Dēvar at Śiṟṟiṅgūr in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam a subdivision of Milāḍu. This is probably a record of Vikrama-Chōḷa whose clear inscription of the 7th year is engraved in continuation of this.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 7Āvatu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmateyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavartevarkku Ikkoyiluṭaiyārkaḷpakkal varakūrk koṭṭamuṭaiyā nampirāṉaṭikaḷ Āccapiṭāri Ikkoyiluṭaiyārkaḷpakkal kuṭutta kācu pattāliraṭṭitta kācu Irupatukku candrāditta
vaṟ Erikkakkaṭava tirunantā viḷakku Iraṇṭum Erikkakkaṭavom Ikkoyiluṭaiyārkaḷom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.182 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
